actions.value:
By viewing your XPub, you'll be able to see all of your used and unused (derived) public addresses, and all blockchain activity associated with a multi-address, or hierarchally deterministic wallet.


To access the XPub of any multi-address wallet:

1. Open Edge and view the main list of your wallets (tap "Assets" at the bottom-left, of your navigation bar) 

2. Now tap on the wallet to enter it

3. Tap on the three vertical dots in the upper-right

4. A menu will come up with the option to "View XPub Address," tap on that option.

5. Next, copy that address and paste it into this Trezor block explorer tool -  https://btc1.trezor.io


Note: For Segwit enabled wallets, you will see 2 xpub strings:  ypub... & zpub...
Make sure that you only query one at a time in the xpub explorer.


If the explorer still doesn't give you a result, you may need to convert your XPub address into a supported address here https://www.blockonomics.co/views/segwit_xpub_convert.html , select "It starts with a 3" and then copy/paste the yPub into the Trezor block explorer.
